== Notes for [[Item:Q3047|Q3047]] ==

11. JUAN-ALONSO5 DE ESTRADA (ANA4 ESTRADA-DE-LA-CABALLERIA, ALONSO3 DE ESTRADA, FERDINAND II (THE2 CATHOLIC), JOHN II OF1 ARAGON) was born 03 Feb 1541/42 in Villa Qrquedo, Toledo, Spain. He married MARIANA DE GUEVARA-BARRIOS, daughter of DIEGO DE GUEVARA and ISABEL DE BARRIOS. Notes for JUAN-ALONSO DE ESTRADA: He went by the name Alonso de Estrada. Source:Mil Familias III by Rodolfo Gonzalez de la Garza.Page 84. Children of JUAN-ALONSO DE ESTRADA and MARIANA DE GUEVARA-BARRIOS are:
* 15. i. ESTEBAN DE SOSA-GUEVARA, b. Santa Olalla, Toledo, Spain.
* ii. ALONSO DE SOSA-GUEVARA, m. ANTONIA DE GUEVARA.
* 16. iii. MARIANA DE GUEVARA-ESTRADA, b. 1555.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/estrada.htm married

MARIANA DE GUEVARA-BARRIOS, on source state that is COMPLETELY IMPOSSIBLE CHRONOLOGICALLY!

--------------------
Name has been given as - Alonso Avila Alvarado
====================
A. Alonso SOSA ESTRADA m. Mariana GUEVARA BARRIOS.
1. Esteban SOSA ALBORNOZ m. Ana ALBORNOZ.

2. Francisco SOSA ALBORNOZ m. 1560, Ines TAPIA SOSA, (daughter of Andres DE-TAPIA and Isabel DE-SOSA).

http://www.vsalgs.org/stnemgenealogy/alonsoes.html
========================
11. JUAN-ALONSO4 (SOSA) DE ESTRADA (JUAN-ALONSO3 DE CABRERA, LOPE2 DE SOSA, JUAN-ALONSO1 DE SOUSA) was born 03 Feb 1542 in Villa Qrquedo, Toledo, Spain. He married MARIANA DE GUEVARA-Y-DE-BARRIOS, daughter of DIEGO DE GUEVARA-Y-TOVAR and ISABEL DE BARRIOS-URREA-Y-SUAREZ. She was born in Mexico City, D. F., New Spain (Mexico).

Notes for JUAN-ALONSO (SOSA) DE ESTRADA: He did not use his paternal surname of Sosa. He is known as Juan Alonso de Estrada & Alonso de Estrada.

Source: Mil Familias III by Rodolfo Gonzalez de la Garza. Page 84.

Notes for Isabel de Barrios Urrea y Suarez: She is the daughter of Conquistador Andres Barrios and Maria Suarez de Avila, and a niece to Conquistador Hernan Cortez, the Marquis of Oaxaca.

Children of JUAN-ALONSO DE ESTRADA and MARIANA DE GUEVARA-Y-DE-BARRIOS are:

15. i. ESTEBAN5 DE SOSA-GUEVARA, b. Santa Olalla, Toledo, Spain.

ii. ALONSO DE SOSA-GUEVARA, m. ANTONIA DE GUEVARA.

Notes for ALONSO DE SOSA-GUEVARA: A.K.A. Juan Alonso de Sosa y Estrada.

16. iii. MARIANA DE GUEVARA-ESTRADA, b. 1555, Mexico City, D. F., New Spain (Mexico).

FRANCISCA DE ESTRADA-Y-GUERVARA, m. AGUSTIN DE ZAVALA.

ARCHBISHOP OF MEXICO (and Santo Domingo) , DIEGO DE GUEVARA Y ESTRADA, On January 13, 1642, he was appointed Archbishop of Santo Domingo (Dominican Republic). He died in Santo Domingo on April 08, 1644. Source: From the Archives Of the Catholic Church Hierarchy.

11. JUAN-ALONSO4 (SOSA) DE ESTRADA (JUAN-ALONSO3 DE CABRERA, LOPE2 DE SOSA, JUAN-ALONSO1 DE SOUSA) was born 03 Feb 1542 in Villa Qrquedo, Toledo, Spain. He married MARIANA DE GUEVARA-Y-DE-BARRIOS, daughter of DIEGO DE GUEVARA-Y-TOVAR and ISABEL DE BARRIOS-URREA-Y-SUAREZ. She was born in Mexico City, D. F., New Spain (Mexico).

Notes for JUAN-ALONSO (SOSA) DE ESTRADA: He did not use his paternal surname of Sosa. He is known as Juan Alonso de Estrada & Alonso de Estrada.

Source: Mil Familias III by Rodolfo Gonzalez de la Garza. Page 84.

Notes for Isabel de Barrios Urrea y Suarez: She is the daughter of Conquistador Andres Barrios and Maria Suarez de Avila, and a niece to Conquistador Hernan Cortez, the Marquis of Oaxaca.

Children of JUAN-ALONSO DE ESTRADA and MARIANA DE GUEVARA-Y-DE-BARRIOS are:

15. i. ESTEBAN5 DE SOSA-GUEVARA, b. Santa Olalla, Toledo, Spain.

ii. ALONSO DE SOSA-GUEVARA, m. ANTONIA DE GUEVARA.

Notes for ALONSO DE SOSA-GUEVARA: A.K.A. Juan Alonso de Sosa y Estrada.

16. iii. MARIANA DE GUEVARA-ESTRADA, b. 1555, Mexico City, D. F., New Spain (Mexico).

FRANCISCA DE ESTRADA-Y-GUERVARA, m. AGUSTIN DE ZAVALA.

ARCHBISHOP OF MEXICO (and Santo Domingo) , DIEGO DE GUEVARA Y ESTRADA, On January 13, 1642, he was appointed Archbishop of Santo Domingo (Dominican Republic). He died in Santo Domingo on April 08, 1644. Source: From the Archives Of the Catholic Church Hierarchy.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/sosa.htm

============================================

20. FRANCISCO7 DE SOSA-GUEVARA-Y-ALBORNOZ (ESTEBAN6 DE SOSA-GUEVARA, JUAN-ALONSO5 DE ESTRADA, ANA4 ESTRADA-DE-LA-CABALLERIA, ALONSO3 DE ESTRADA, FERDINAND II (THE2 CATHOLIC), JOHN II OF1 ARAGON) was born 1530 in Santa Olalla, Spain. He married INES DE TAPIA-Y-SOSA 1548 in Xochitla, Mexico City, D.F., Mexico, daughter of ANDRES DE TAPIA and ISABEL DE SOSA. She was born in Spain, and died in Mexico City, F.D., Mexico.

Notes for FRANCISCO DE SOSA-GUEVARA-Y-ALBORNOZ:

In the book, Mil Familias III, by Rodolfo Gonzalez de la Garza, he is listed as a descendent of the Don Alonso of Estrada, Duke of Aragon. Page 85.

Conquistador of Nueva Galicia, Mexico.

Marriage Notes for FRANCISCO DE SOSA-GUEVARA-Y-ALBORNOZ and INES DE TAPIA-Y-SOSA:

Marriage source from the book, Mil Familias III by Rodolfo Gonzalez de la Garza. Page 85.

Children of FRANCISCO DE SOSA-GUEVARA-Y-ALBORNOZ and INES DE TAPIA-Y-SOSA are:

28. i. CAPTAIN ALONSO8 DE SOSA-ALBORNOZ, b. Abt. 1549, Xochitle, Mexico F.D., Mexico; d. Abt. 1601, Murdered at San Gabriel, New Mexico.

ii. ANA DE SOSA-ALBORNOZ, d. Bef. 02 Sep 1591, Mexico City, F.D. Mexico?.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA7EB751EFBBFA9822EF79916CA92C
geni:6000000007385723086


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
